name: Bible QA (OpenClaw Church)
tagline: Answer Bible questions by passage, person, or theme with context and scripture references.
description: Answers questions about a Bible passage, person, or topic with historical/literary background, key verses (cited with translation), and brief pastoral application. Interprets strictly by the text; labels 'Reference application / not direct scripture' where needed. Default: ESV, Evangelical; plain text output. For pastors, elders, and church teachers. Related: Sermon Outline, Pastoral Prayer, Church Announcement skills by OpenClaw Church.
